------ Created from incident source: INC10444877 ------
Source Incident : https://watson.service-now.com/now/nav/ui/classic/params/target/incident.do%3Fsys_id%3D493730e52be1ba904a32f414d891bfcc%26sysparm_stack%3Dincident_list.do%3Fsysparm_query%3Dactive%3Dtrue


Previous incident ref: https://watson.service-now.com/now/nav/ui/classic/params/target/incident.do%3Fsys_id%3D493730e52be1ba904a32f414d891bfcc%26sysparm_stack%3Dincident_list.do%3Fsysparm_query%3Dactive%3Dtrue

Patch Snapshot resources stuck for deletion to clean up the stuck resource in LON RIAS

Region: LON
RIAS
Jumpod : Yes



1. 

for n in $(kubectl get storagesnapshots -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.spec.referenceVolumeID=="r018-db3b155e-8c57-49d1-8d36-257fe4664250") | select(.status.failureReason=="VolumeAlreadyLocked")| "\(.metadata.name)"'); do
name=$(echo $n | awk '{print $1}');
kubectl patch storagesnapshots -n 0f628e88c6594675bbefa097a63b9293 "$name" --type=merge -p '{"metadata":{"finalizers":[]}}';
done


2. After ~5 minutes run following command to verify all the hanging resources for deletion got cleaned up

kubectl get storagesnapshots -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.spec.referenceVolumeID=="r018-db3b155e-8c57-49d1-8d36-257fe4664250") | select(.status.failureReason=="VolumeAlreadyLocked")| "\(.metadata.namespace) \(.metadata.name)"'
